creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: sunpoet
Date: Tue Jan 10 19:24:37 UTC 2017
New revision: 431127
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/431127

Log:
  Move devel/py-gflags to devel/py-python-gflags and update to 3.1.0

  - Add LICENSE_FILE
  - Add NO_ARCH
  - Relax USES=python
  - Allow concurrent installation (USE_PYTHON=concurrent)
  - Remove PROJECTHOST
  - Update WWW

  Changes:	https://github.com/google/python-gflags/releases
  PR:		215614
  Differential Revision:	https://reviews.FreeBSD.org/D8926
  Submitted by:	sunpoet (myself)
  Approved by:	maintainer (timeout, 14 days)

Changes:

  head/deskutils/gcalcli/Makefile
  head/devel/Makefile

  head/devel/py-gflags/

  head/www/closure-linter/Makefile
